schema.purpose: BPHS Chapters 46-50, 73 dasha-phala (results of each mahadasha and antardasha). Actionable rule schema with dasha key, effect domains, weight, cancellation conditions, translations and provenance.
schema.approximate_verses: shloka-level references are placeholders pending Pandit verification
schema.note: Each rule is keyed by `dasha_key`, matched against the app's dasha system via dashaEvidence(). `cancellation` lists classical conditions that modify the dasha result; the app notes them but strength modifiers come from the shared exception engine.
schema.polarity: positive = beneficial dasha result, negative = adverse dasha effect, mixed = conditional

cancellation: Sun severely afflicted by Saturn/Rahu/Ketu
Sun in 6/8/12 from lagna without benefic aspect
Sun combust or debilitated without neechabhanga

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha (6 years): Authority, government favor, status, but health issues if afflicted. Success through father, leadership roles, and self-employment.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा (6 वर्ष): प्राधिकरण, सरकारी सहयोग, पद, परन्तु पीड़ा यदि कष्टित। पिता से सफलता, नेतृत्व पद, व स्व-रोजगार।

cancellation: Moon afflicted by malefics in 4th or Moon in 6/8/12
Moon in debilitation without cancellation
Moon with Ketu or in Rahu/Ketu axis

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha (10 years): Happiness from mother, home comforts, mental peace, travel, gains through women. Emotional fluctuations if Moon weak.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा (10 वर्ष): माता से सुख, घर की सुविधा, मानसिक शांति, यात्रा, स्त्रियों से लाभ। भावनात्मक उतार-चढ़ाव यदि चंद्र दुर्बल।

cancellation: Mars combust or debilitated without neechabhanga
Mars in 6/8/12 or afflicted by Saturn/Rahu
Mars in 12th house weakens results

translations.en: Mars Mahadasha (7 years): Courage, property acquisition, gains from siblings, but conflicts, injury risk. Success in military, police, engineering, sports.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा (7 वर्ष): साहस, संपत्ति, भाई-बहनों से लाभ, परन्तु संघर्ष, चोट का जोखिम। सैन्य, पुलिस, इंजीनियरिंग, खेल में सफलता।

cancellation: Rahu with Jupiter or benefic aspect reduces negativity
Rahu in 3/11 houses gives good results
Rahu exalted or in own sign (Aquarius, Taurus)

translations.en: Rahu Mahadasha (18 years): Foreign travel, unconventional success, technology, but confusion, addiction risk, deception. Sudden changes in life direction.
translations.hi: राहु महादशा (18 वर्ष): विदेश यात्रा, अपरंपरागत सफलता, प्रौद्योगिकी, परन्तु भ्रम, लत का जोखिम, छल। जीवन दिशा में अचानक बदलाव।

cancellation: Jupiter combust or in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Jupiter debilitated without neechabhanga
Jupiter afflicted by Saturn/Rahu

translations.en: Jupiter Mahadasha (16 years): Wisdom, teaching, children's happiness, wealth accumulation, spiritual growth, fortune. Auspicious ceremonies and recognition.
translations.hi: गुरु महादशा (16 वर्ष): ज्ञान, शिक्षण, संतान सुख, धन संचय, आध्यात्मिक वृद्धि, भाग्य। शुभ समारोह व पहचान।

cancellation: Saturn in own sign (Capricorn, Aquarius) or exalted (Libra)
Saturn with Jupiter or benefic aspect
Saturn in 3/6/11 houses gives good results

translations.en: Saturn Mahadasha (19 years): Hard work, discipline, delays, obstacles, but stability, land acquisition, gains from elderly, mining/oil industry. Long-term achievements through persistence.
translations.hi: शनि महादशा (19 वर्ष): कठिन परिश्रम, अनुशासन, विलंब, बाधाएँ, परन्तु स्थिरता, भूमि अर्जन, बड़ों से लाभ, खनन/तेल उद्योग। दृढ़ता से दीर्घकालिक उपलब्धि।

cancellation: Mercury combust or debilitated without neechabhanga
Mercury afflicted by Saturn/Mars
Mercury in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect

translations.en: Mercury Mahadasha (17 years): Communication skills, business success, education, writing, intellectual pursuits, trading. Multiple sources of income through intellect.
translations.hi: बुध महादशा (17 वर्ष): संचार कौशल, व्यापार सफलता, शिक्षा, लेखन, बौद्धिक गतिविधियाँ, व्यापार। बौद्धिकता से कई आय स्रोत।

cancellation: Venus combust or debilitated without neechabhanga
Venus afflicted by Saturn/Mars/Sun
Venus in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect

translations.en: Venus Mahadasha (20 years): Marriage, love affairs, luxury, artistic pursuits, vehicles, wealth accumulation, sensual pleasures. Success in entertainment, fashion, beauty industry.
translations.hi: शुक्र महादशा (20 वर्ष): विवाह, प्रेम संबंध, विलासिता, कलात्मक गतिविधियाँ, वाहन, धन संचय, भौतिक सुख। मनोरंजन, फैशन, सौंदर्य उद्योग में सफलता।

cancellation: Ketu with Jupiter or benefic aspect reduces negativity
Ketu in 3/11 houses gives good results
Ketu in own sign (Pisces) or exalted (Scorpio)

translations.en: Ketu Mahadasha (7 years): Spiritual pursuits, detachment, research, occult interests, but sudden events, potential losses. Liberation from material attachments through inner realization.
translations.hi: केतु महादशा (7 वर्ष): आध्यात्मिक गतिविधियाँ, वैराग्य, शोध, रहस्यमयी रुचि, परन्तु अचानक घटनाएँ, संभावित हानि। भौतिक मोह से मुक्ति आंतरिक प्रज्ञान से।

cancellation: Sun severely afflicted in chart
Sun antardasha in difficult planetary periods

translations.en: Sun MD - Sun AD: Peak authority, career advancement, government favor, recognition through leadership. Father's health and status important.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - सूर्य अंतर्दशा: प्राधिकरण चरम, करियर प्रगति, सरकारी सहयोग, नेतृत्व से पहचान। पिता का स्वास्थ्य व पद महत्वपूर्ण।

cancellation: Moon afflicted or weak in chart
Emotional conflicts during authority periods

translations.en: Sun MD - Moon AD: Emotional balance needed, mother's influence, home matters, mental peace critical for career success. Authority tempered by emotions.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - चंद्र अंतर्दशा: भावनात्मक संतुलन आवश्यक, माता का प्रभाव, घर के मामले, करियर सफलता के लिए मानसिक शांति महत्वपूर्ण। प्राधिकरण भावनाओं से नियंत्रित।

cancellation: Mars well-placed or strong reduces negatives
Mars aspect by benefics helps

translations.en: Sun MD - Mars AD: Potential conflicts, aggression, injury risk, but also courage and competitive success. Authority exercised forcefully.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - मंगल अंतर्दशा: संभावित संघर्ष, आक्रमण, चोट का जोखिम, परन्तु साहस व प्रतिस्पर्धी सफलता। प्राधिकरण बलपूर्वक प्रयोग।

cancellation: Jupiter afflicted reduces benefits
Emotional conflicts with wisdom

translations.en: Moon MD - Jupiter AD: Wisdom, children's happiness, wealth accumulation, spiritual growth, fortune. Emotional stability supports intellectual pursuits.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - गुरु अंतर्दशा: ज्ञान, संतान सुख, धन संचय, आध्यात्मिक वृद्धि, भाग्य। भावनात्मक स्थिरता बौद्धिक गतिविधियों का समर्थन करती है।

cancellation: Saturn well-placed reduces severity
Mutual aspect or yoga between Mars and Saturn modifies results

translations.en: Mars MD - Saturn AD: Significant delays, obstacles, hard work required, discipline needed. Potential conflicts with authority. Frustration in aggressive pursuits.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा - शनि अंतर्दशा: महत्वपूर्ण विलंब, बाधाएँ, कठिन परिश्रम आवश्यक, अनुशासन आवश्यक। प्राधिकरण के साथ संघर्ष की संभावना। आक्रामक गतिविधियों में निराशा।

cancellation: Jupiter strong reduces Rahu's negativity
Good placement of both planets modifies results

translations.en: Rahu MD - Jupiter AD: Conflict between spiritual values and material desires, foreign opportunities, unconventional wisdom. Jupiter tempers Rahu's extremes.
translations.hi: राहु महादशा - गुरु अंतर्दशा: आध्यात्मिक मूल्यों और भौतिक इच्छाओं के बीच संघर्ष, विदेशी अवसर, अपरंपरागत ज्ञान। गुरु राहु के चरमपंथों को नियंत्रित करता है।

cancellation: Saturn afflicted reduces benefits
Jupiter-Saturn conflict if poorly placed

translations.en: Jupiter MD - Saturn AD: Wisdom combined with discipline, long-term goal achievement, stability through hard work. Jupiter's optimism tempers Saturn's delays.
translations.hi: गुरु महादशा - शनि अंतर्दशा: ज्ञान का अनुशासन के साथ मेल, दीर्घकालिक लक्ष्य प्राप्ति, कठिन परिश्रम से स्थिरता। गुरु का आशावादी शनि के विलंब को नियंत्रित करता है।

cancellation: Venus strong reduces Saturn's harshness
Good relationship between Saturn and Venus helps

translations.en: Saturn MD - Venus AD: Stability in luxury and comfort, delayed gratification in pleasures, mature relationships. Venus softens Saturn's austerity.
translations.hi: शनि महादशा - शुक्र अंतर्दशा: विलास व सुख में स्थिरता, आनंद में विलंबित संतुष्टि, परिपक्व संबंध। शुक्र शनि की कठोरता को नरम करता है।

cancellation: Good placement of both planets reduces conflicts
Benefic aspects help balance energies

translations.en: Venus MD - Mars AD: Passion conflicts with harmony, relationship challenges, competitive romance. Mars' aggression disrupts Venus' peace.
translations.hi: शुक्र महादशा - मंगल अंतर्दशा: जुनून और सामंजस्य में संघर्ष, रिश्तों में चुनौतियाँ, प्रतिस्पर्धी रोमांस। मंगल की आक्रामकता शुक्र की शांति को भंग करती है।

cancellation: Mercury afflicted reduces benefits
Ketu's detachment may conflict with Mercury's communication

translations.en: Ketu MD - Mercury AD: Spiritual intellect, analytical detachment, research combining wisdom and logic. Mercury grounds Ketu's abstract tendencies.
translations.hi: केतु महादशा - बुध अंतर्दशा: आध्यात्मिक बौद्धिकता, विश्लेषणात्मक वैराग्य, ज्ञान और तर्क का संयोजित शोध। बुध केतु के अमूर्त झुकाव को स्थिर करता है।

cancellation: Both planets well-placed reduces severity
Jupiter's aspect or association helps

translations.en: Rahu MD - Saturn AD: Extreme delays and obstacles, especially in foreign matters, material-spiritual crisis. Double malefic effect requires patience and remedial measures.
translations.hi: राहु महादशा - शनि अंतर्दशा: चरम विलंब और बाधाएँ, विशेष रूप से विदेशी मामलों में, भौतिक-आध्यात्मिक संकट। दोगुना दुष्प्रभाव के लिए धैर्य और उपाय आवश्यक।

cancellation: Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Mercury Antardasha: A mixed influence period with mixed results in career, status, authority and communication, business, education. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - बुध अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और communication, business, education में मिश्रित फल देने वाली सामान्य अवधि।

cancellation: Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Jupiter Antardasha: A harmonious blend period favoring career, status, authority and wisdom, teaching, children. Results are generally supportive and growth-oriented.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - गुरु अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और wisdom, teaching, children के लिए अनुकूल सामंजस्यपूर्ण अवधि।

cancellation: Venus afflicted or poorly placed increases difficulties
Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Venus Antardasha: A challenging combination period with mixed results in career, status, authority and marriage, love, luxury. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - शुक्र अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और marriage, love, luxury में मिश्रित फल देने वाली द्वैध अवधि।

cancellation: Saturn afflicted or poorly placed increases difficulties
Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Saturn Antardasha: A challenging combination period bringing obstacles in career, status, authority and discipline, hard_work, delays. Caution and remedial measures are advisable.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - शनि अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और discipline, hard_work, delays में बाधाएँ लाने वाली विरोधी अवधि। सावधानी और उपाय उचित।

cancellation: Rahu afflicted or poorly placed increases difficulties
Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result
Benefic aspect or association of Jupiter reduces nodal extremes

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Rahu Antardasha: A challenging combination period bringing obstacles in career, status, authority and foreign, unconventional, sudden_changes. Caution and remedial measures are advisable.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - राहु अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और foreign, unconventional, sudden_changes में बाधाएँ लाने वाली विरोधी अवधि। सावधानी और उपाय उचित।

cancellation: Sun strength and dignity modifies overall result
Benefic aspect or association of Jupiter reduces nodal extremes

translations.en: Sun Mahadasha - Ketu Antardasha: A mixed influence period with mixed results in career, status, authority and spirituality, detachment, research. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: सूर्य महादशा - केतु अंतर्दशा: career, status, authority और spirituality, detachment, research में मिश्रित फल देने वाली सामान्य अवधि।

cancellation: Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Sun Antardasha: A harmonious blend period with mixed results in family, mother, emotions and career, status, authority. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - सूर्य अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और career, status, authority में मिश्रित फल देने वाली द्वैध अवधि।

cancellation: Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Moon Antardasha: A intensified period favoring family, mother, emotions and family, mother, emotions. Results are generally supportive and growth-oriented.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - चंद्र अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और family, mother, emotions के लिए अनुकूल सकारात्मक अवधि।

cancellation: Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Mars Antardasha: A mixed influence period with mixed results in family, mother, emotions and courage, property, siblings. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - मंगल अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और courage, property, siblings में मिश्रित फल देने वाली सामान्य अवधि।

cancellation: Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Mercury Antardasha: A harmonious blend period favoring family, mother, emotions and communication, business, education. Results are generally supportive and growth-oriented.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - बुध अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और communication, business, education के लिए अनुकूल सामंजस्यपूर्ण अवधि।

cancellation: Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Venus Antardasha: A mixed influence period with mixed results in family, mother, emotions and marriage, love, luxury. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - शुक्र अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और marriage, love, luxury में मिश्रित फल देने वाली सामान्य अवधि।

cancellation: Saturn afflicted or poorly placed increases difficulties
Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Saturn Antardasha: A challenging combination period bringing obstacles in family, mother, emotions and discipline, hard_work, delays. Caution and remedial measures are advisable.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - शनि अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और discipline, hard_work, delays में बाधाएँ लाने वाली विरोधी अवधि। सावधानी और उपाय उचित।

Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result
Benefic aspect or association of Jupiter reduces nodal extremes

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Rahu Antardasha: A challenging combination period bringing obstacles in family, mother, emotions and foreign, unconventional, sudden_changes. Caution and remedial measures are advisable.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - राहु अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और foreign, unconventional, sudden_changes में बाधाएँ लाने वाली विरोधी अवधि। सावधानी और उपाय उचित।

Moon strength and dignity modifies overall result
Benefic aspect or association of Jupiter reduces nodal extremes

translations.en: Moon Mahadasha - Ketu Antardasha: A challenging combination period bringing obstacles in family, mother, emotions and spirituality, detachment, research. Caution and remedial measures are advisable.
translations.hi: चंद्र महादशा - केतु अंतर्दशा: family, mother, emotions और spirituality, detachment, research में बाधाएँ लाने वाली विरोधी अवधि। सावधानी और उपाय उचित।

cancellation: Mars strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Mars Mahadasha - Sun Antardasha: A harmonious blend period with mixed results in courage, property, siblings and career, status, authority. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा - सूर्य अंतर्दशा: courage, property, siblings और career, status, authority में मिश्रित फल देने वाली द्वैध अवधि।

cancellation: Mars strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Mars Mahadasha - Moon Antardasha: A harmonious blend period with mixed results in courage, property, siblings and family, mother, emotions. Both opportunities and challenges appear.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा - चंद्र अंतर्दशा: courage, property, siblings और family, mother, emotions में मिश्रित फल देने वाली द्वैध अवधि।

cancellation: Mars strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Mars Mahadasha - Mars Antardasha: A intensified period favoring courage, property, siblings and courage, property, siblings. Results are generally supportive and growth-oriented.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा - मंगल अंतर्दशा: courage, property, siblings और courage, property, siblings के लिए अनुकूल सकारात्मक अवधि।

cancellation: Mars strength and dignity modifies overall result

translations.en: Mars Mahadasha - Jupiter Antardasha: A harmonious blend period favoring courage, property, siblings and wisdom, teaching, children. Results are generally supportive and growth-oriented.
translations.hi: मंगल महादशा - गुरु अंतर्दशा: courage, property, siblings और wisdom, teaching, children के लिए अनुकूल सामंजस्यपूर्ण अवधि।

Benefic aspect or association of Jupiter reduces nodal extremes
